# Oscar OLG Photography — Engagement Giveaway Campaign
## Weekly Metrics Dashboard & Success Tracking

**Budget Per Month:** $2,000 MXN  
**Campaign Duration:** Starting [APRIL 2026]  
**Review Frequency:** Daily monitoring, weekly analysis, monthly optimization  

---

## PART 1: KEY METRICS TO TRACK

### 🎯 TIER 1: CAMPAIGN PERFORMANCE (Most Important)

**These are your North Star metrics — if these move up, everything else follows:**

| Metric | Definition | Week 1 Target | Month 1 Target | How to Track |
|--------|-----------|---|---|---|
| **Cost Per Lead** | Total ad spend ÷ form submissions | $14-18 MXN | $12-15 MXN | Meta Ads Manager |
| **Form Completion Rate** | (Form submissions ÷ landing page visitors) × 100 | 4-6% | 3-5% | GA4 report |
| **Lead Quality Score** | % of leads scoring 10+ points (WARM or better) | 60%+ | 70%+ | Manual tracking |
| **Call Booking Rate** | % of called leads who book a call/session | 50%+ | 60%+ | Manual via calendar |
| **Session → Wedding Booking Rate** | % of free session attendees who book wedding | 30-40% | 35-45% | Manual CRM tracking |
| **Cost Per Wedding Booking** | Total ad spend ÷ wedding bookings closed | $667-1,000 | $500-800 | Manual calculation |

---

### 🎬 TIER 2: CAMPAIGN LOGISTICS (Operational)

| Metric | Week 1 | Month 1 | Status |
|--------|--------|---------|--------|
| **Ad Impressions** | 2,000-3,000 | 6,500+ | Tracked in Meta |
| **Landing Page Clicks** | 60-100 | 250+ | Tracked in Meta |
| **Form Submissions** | 3-4 | 12-15 | Tracked in GA4 |
| **Calls Scheduled** | 2-3 | 6-8 | Manual + Calendly |
| **Sessions Booked** | 1-2 | 3-4 | Manual + Google Cal |
| **Wedding Bookings Closed** | 0 | 1-2 | Manual (CRM if available) |

---

### 💰 TIER 3: FINANCIAL METRICS (ROI)

| Metric | Calculation | Week 1 | Month 1 |
|--------|-------------|--------|---------|
| **Ad Spend** | Manual (budget allocation) | $286 MXN | $2,000 MXN |
| **Cost per Lead** | Ad spend ÷ leads | ? | $133-167 MXN/lead |
| **Cost per Session Booked** | Ad spend ÷ sessions | ? | $500-667 MXN |
| **Cost per Wedding Booking** | Ad spend ÷ weddings booked | ? | $1,000-2,000 MXN |
| **Estimated Revenue (if 1 wedding books)** | Average wedding package price | ? | $10,500-14,500 MXN |
| **Campaign ROI** | (Revenue - Ad spend) ÷ Ad spend | ? | 525%-1,450% |

## PART 4: LEAD-BY-LEAD TRACKING

### Master Lead Spreadsheet (Track Each Person)

**Copy this structure into Google Sheets:**

```
ENGAGEMENT GIVEAWAY CAMPAIGN - MASTER LEAD LOG

Columns to include:

A. DATE_SUBMITTED: [Date form filled]
B. FIRST_NAME: [Their name]
C. WEDDING_DATE: [Their wedding date]
D. ENGAGEMENT_LEVEL: [1-10 based on story]
E. PHOTOGRAPHER_STATUS: [No one / Comparing / Already have]
F. URGENCY_SCORE: [Your calculated score]
F. CALL_SCHEDULED: [Date/time or "—"]
G. CALL_COMPLETED: [Yes/No]
H. OPTION_CHOSEN: [Free / EBIRD / Not ready]
I. SESSION_BOOKED: [Date or "—"]
J. ATTENDED: [Yes/No]
K. WEDDING_BOOKING: [Yes/No]
L. WEDDING_DATE_FINAL: [Their locked date or "—"]
M. REVENUE: [Wedding package price or $0]
N. NOTES: [Key details for follow-up]

Example rows:
4/2  Carlos   9/2026  9/10   No one yet   8      4/3 2pm   ✓   Free    5/10   ✓      No        —           $0     "Great couple"
4/2  María    7/2026  7/10   Comparing    5      4/4 3pm   ✓   EBIRD   5/15   ✓      ✓         7/15/2026   $12000 "Booked! 🎉"
```

**Track this for insights:**
- Which leads convert fastest? (time from lead to booking)
- Which urgency score converts best? (quality signal)
- Which call times have highest conversion? (AM vs PM)
- Which option converts better? (Free vs Early Bird)

### Print this out or keep in a doc you check weekly:

```

├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤

│ Target sessions: 3-4  →  Actual: [__]                  │
│ Target weddings: 1-2  →  Actual: [__]                  │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

EFFICIENCY SCORECARD:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ Metric               Target    Actual    Status          │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Cost Per Lead        $14-18    $[__]     ✅/⚠️/❌        │
│ Form Completion      4-6%      [__]%     ✅/⚠️/❌        │
│ Lead Quality         60%+      [__]%     ✅/⚠️/❌        │
│ Call Booking Rate    50%+      [__]%     ✅/⚠️/❌        │
│ Session Attendance   90%+      [__]%     ✅/⚠️/❌        │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

RECOMMENDATIONS FOR NEXT WEEK:

IF Cost Per Lead > $18:
  → Pause bottom 3 underperforming ads
  → Refine "just engaged" targeting
  → Improve form copy on landing page

IF Form Completion < 4%:
  → Simplify form (remove non-essential fields)
  → Add social proof above form
  → Check mobile loading speed

IF Lead Quality < 60%:
  → Refocus audience: Filter out "comparing photographers"
  → Adjust ad copy to attract earlier-stage couples
  → Test messaging angle

IF Call Booking < 50%:
  → Speed up response time to <30min
  → Pre-qualify before calling
  → Improve call script opening

IF Session Attendance < 85%:
  → Send reminder 24hrs before
  → Send reminder 30min before
  → Have backup date ready
```

---

## PART 6: DECISION RULES (When to Optimize)

### If This Happens → Do This:

```
COST PER LEAD ISSUES:

❌ If CPL > $20 MXN (2 days running):
   → Pause bottom 2 ads immediately
   → Reduce targeting to core audience only
   → Cut testing budget to 5%

⚠️ If CPL $15-20 (trending up):
   → Review landing page bounce rate (GA4)
   → A/B test new ad creative
   → Refine audience by location

✅ If CPL < $12 MXN (consistent):
   → Increase daily budget by 20%
   → Test new audience segments
   → Keep this ad active

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

FORM COMPLETION ISSUES:

❌ If completion rate < 3%:
   → Which field are they dropping at? (check GA4 form analytics)
   → Remove non-essential fields TODAY
   → Simplify copy on landing page
   → Test: 3-field form vs 5-field form

⚠️ If completion rate 3-5%:
   → Monitor weekly, keep as is
   → Test social proof messaging
   → A/B test form headline

✅ If completion rate 5%+:
   → Perfect — keep running
   → Scale ad spend up 25%
   → Document this for next campaign

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

LEAD QUALITY ISSUES:

❌ If only 40% of leads score 10+ points:
   → What's the problem?
     • Their wedding date too far? (adjust audience timeline)
     • They already have a photographer? (add exclusion)
     • They're not engaged yet? (refocus FB audience)
   → Adjust targeting TODAY

✅ If 70%+ of leads score 10+ points:
   → Your targeting is PERFECT
   → Consider scaling budget 30-50%
   → Use this audience as your lookalike

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

CONVERSION PIPELINE ISSUES:

❌ If leads aren't calling/booking:
   → HOW FAST are you following up?
     • < 1 hour: Should be 70% response rate
     • 2-4 hours: Should be 50% response rate
     • 24+ hours: Should be <20% response rate
   → SPEED UP your follow-up

❌ If calls aren't converting to sessions:
   → Review call script recording (record with permission)
   → Are you asking for the booking?
   → Are you presenting both options clearly?
   → Practice the close more

❌ If sessions aren't converting to weddings:
   → This is expected Month 1 (they need time)
   → Focus on post-session follow-up (MSG 7)
   → Track: How many say "maybe" vs "no"
   → If getting lots of "no" — session might not be resonating
```

## PART 8: METRICS THAT MATTER (Deep Dive)

### Cost Per Lead Breakdown

If your CPL is too high, check in this order:

```
1. Meta Ads CPL (what Meta charges to send traffic)
   → Dashboard: Ads Manager > Campaign > Cost Per Result
   → Target: <$1 USD ($15-18 MXN)
   → If different in GA4, it means form optimization is issue

2. Landing Page Conversion Rate (% of visitors who submit form)
   → Dashboard: GA4 > Engagement > Conversion rate
   → Formula: (Form submissions ÷ landing page visitors) × 100
   → Target: 4-6%
   → If <3%: Landing page problem (bad copy, slow load, confusion)

3. Form Abandonment Rate (% who start but don't finish)
   → Dashboard: GA4 > Engagement > Form abandonment
   → Watch: Which field makes people drop off?
   → If >50% abandonment on specific field: DELETE that field

Example Math:
  • Ad spend: $2,000 MXN
  • Landing page visitors: 300
  • Form submissions: 12
  • Cost per lead: $2,000 ÷ 12 = $167 MXN

  To improve:
    Option A: Reduce ad cost (better targeting)
    Option B: Improve form completion (better copy/design)
    Option C: Increase traffic (more ad impressions)
```

### Lead Quality Breakdown

```
Calculation: (Total leads with score 10+) ÷ (Total leads) × 100

Example:
  • Total leads: 12
  • High quality (score 10+): 8
  • Quality rate: 8/12 = 67% ✅

If quality rate is below 60%:
  • Check: Are you targeting engagement level right?
    (Should be: just engaged, not already planning 2 years out)
  • Check: Are you excluding "already booked photographer"?
    (Facebook should have this exclusion)
  • Check: Is your landing page attracting the right people?
    (Copy should emphasize "early planning" phase)
```

### Session → Wedding Conversion Tracking

```
After each free engagement session, track:

Column: WEDDING_BOOKING (Yes/No)
       ↓
If YES:  Package: [EBIRD / BRONZE / SILVER / GOLD]
         Date: [When they locked it]
         Price: $[AMOUNT MXN]
         Notes: [How they decided, any objections, etc.]

If NO:   Last response: [DATE]
         Status: [Said no / Maybe later / Still thinking]
         Follow-up: [Next message date]
         Notes: [Why they didn't book]

Conversion rate = (Yes bookings ÷ total sessions) × 100

If consistently < 25%:
  → Is your post-session follow-up weak?
  → Are you asking for the sale on day 1?
  → Is the session not delivering value?
  → Is early bird pricing not compelling?
  
If 35%+ converting:
  → You've cracked the code
  → Scale up budget
  → Document this for training
```

---

## PART 9: RED FLAGS (Stop & Diagnose)

### ⚠️ Stop and think if:

```
IF... CPL jumps from $12 to $25+ overnight
→ Did you accidentally expand audience?
   Check: Facebook audience settings changed?
→ Did your landing page performance drop?
   Check: GA4 conversion rate % (if dropped = landing page issue)
→ Did you hit audience saturation?
   Check: How long has campaign been running? (2nd week often sees CPL rise)

IF... Form completion rate drops below 3%
→ Mobile loading speed (test on phone, should load <2 sec)
→ Form suddenly asking more questions (did you add fields?)
→ Is form visible on mobile? (scroll to it, make sure it's clickable)

IF... People aren't responding to WhatsApp messages
→ Are you messaging at right time? (9am-8pm best)
→ Do your messages have clear call-to-action?
→ Are you following up FAST enough (<1 hour)?

IF... Sessions are booked but people don't show up
→ Are you sending day-before reminders? (MSG 5)
→ Are you sending 1-hour-before reminders?
→ Do they have clear location/time info?

IF... Sessions book but people don't convert to weddings
→ Are you sending post-session upsell within 24hrs? (MSG 7)
→ Is your early bird discount compelling enough?
→ Do they actually love their photos? (ask during follow-up)
```

---

## 🎯 FINAL SUMMARY: What to Track This Month

**MUST TRACK (daily):**
- Ad spend (from Meta Ads Manager)
- Cost per lead (calculate: spend ÷ form submissions)
- Lead quality score (from your lead form data)

**SHOULD TRACK (weekly):**
- Form completion rate % (from GA4)
- Calls scheduled vs. completed (from calendar + WhatsApp)
- Sessions booked (from calendar)

**NICE TO TRACK (monthly):**
- Wedding bookings closed
- Revenue generated
- Which ads performed best
- Which audience segments converted best

**Print this and check it every Friday.** Your future campaign improvements depend on accurate data today. 📊

**Next steps:** Set up these spreadsheets NOW (before campaign launches). Then fill them in daily for 4 weeks. By May 1st, you'll have perfect data to optimize & scale. 🚀
